label: Replicate
description: Run open-source AI models via Replicate's cloud API with a simple token-based auth.

form.title: Connect Replicate
form.subtitle: Paste your Replicate API token to start running open-source models.

methods.label: API Token
methods.description: Paste your personal API token (starts with r8_) from your Replicate account settings. No OAuth setup required — the simplest and fastest path.
methods.how_to:
## Get your Replicate API token

1. Sign in at [replicate.com](https://replicate.com).
2. Click your avatar in the top-right corner and select **Account settings**.
3. Scroll down to the **API tokens** section.
4. Click **Create token** (or copy an existing one).
5. Give it a name like `Anton` and click **Create**.
6. Copy the token — it starts with `r8_` and is shown in full only once.
7. Paste it into the **API Token** field below and click **Submit**.

## Notes

- Keep the token secret; anyone who has it can run models and incur charges on your account.
- If you lose it, generate a new one from the same settings page and update it here.
- You can revoke a token at any time from **Account settings → API tokens** without affecting other tokens.

fields.name: api_token
fields.label: API Token
fields.description: Your Replicate personal API token. Found at replicate.com → Account settings → API tokens.
